COCORELICS-ZEDU_COCO.title: Zedu Cocoa
COCORELICS-ZEDU_COCO.description: Right-click a room on the map to preview its contents. Unknown rooms become fixed the moment you observe them.
COCORELICS-ZEDU_COCO.flavor: Once Cocoa sees it, chance stops pretending.
COCORELICS-BIG_MEAL.title: Big Meal
COCORELICS-BIG_MEAL.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Energy:energyIcons()}[/blue]. After surviving {SurviveRounds} rounds in a combat, you immediately die. If a teammate is still alive when you die, this relic transfers to a random surviving teammate.
COCORELICS-BIG_MEAL.flavor: Mix two cocoas together and somehow it now counts as a full meal.
